display.purpose: Hero headlines on the marketing site and oversized KPI tiles on the dashboard. Cap at clamp(2.5rem, 7vw, 6rem).

headline.purpose: Section titles, page titles, large in-card values.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal titles, table headers, list-item primary text.

body.purpose: Default body copy. 65–75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Short labels only: button text, kickers, status pills, table column headers. Reserved for short strings.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Optional resting lift on Table headers and select cards.

shadows.name: glow-primary
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA in marketing hero contexts. Reserved for the public site.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease for state transitions (hover, focus, panel open/close).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Larger transitions: toast enter, modal mount, sidebar collapse.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Sidebar collapse, header scroll-state transition, panel open.

zindex.name: scale
zindex.purpose: Semantic z-index scale. No arbitrary values like 9999.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action on a screen. Flat Operational Blue fill, Deep Cobalt on hover, 4px focus ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4F7DF3; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 12px 16px; height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3F6AE1; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.10); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action, low-emphasis. Transparent until hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #64748B; padding: 12px 16px; height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F8FAFC; color: #0F172A; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.10); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-ghost { transition: none; } }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Default text input. Slate border, slate placeholder, indigo focus.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #CBD5E1; background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.30); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #818CF8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.10); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #F8FAFC; color: #94A3B8; border-color: #E2E8F0; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-input { transition: none; } }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default surface container. White on a surface wash, 1px border, flat at rest.
components.html:
Orders in progress
12 active · 3 overdue
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-meta { margin-top: 4px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; color: #64748B; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Status communication. Pill, uppercase tracked, status color as text, tinted background.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-pill--success { background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.10); color: #047857; } .ds-pill--error { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.10); color: #B91C1C; } .ds-pill--warning { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.10); color: #B45309; } .ds-pill--info { background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.10); color: #1D4ED8; } .ds-pill--neutral { background: #F1F5F9; color: #475569; }

components.name: Admin Sidebar Item (Active)
components.description: Active state in the dark admin sidebar. 3px left border in Operational Blue is the only sanctioned accent on a nav item.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.60); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; border-left: 3px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #FFFFFF; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10); border-left-color: #4F7DF3; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #4F7DF3; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-nav-item { transition: none; } }

components.name: Marketing Hero CTA
components.description: Primary action in the public marketing hero. Operational Blue with a 30% brand glow. Reserved for the public site.
components.css: .ds-hero-cta { background: #4F7DF3; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 20px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 12px 30px -10px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.30); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-hero-cta:hover { background: #3F6AE1; transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-hero-cta:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.20), 0 12px 30px -10px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.30); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-hero-cta { transition: none; } .ds-hero-cta:hover { transform: none; } }

narrative.overview:
Klean is a multi-role SaaS for laundry and dry-cleaning operations. Its primary surface is the dashboard that branch managers and staff use all day; the public marketing site is a secondary surface. The system is designed to surface what needs attention, not everything that's happening. Every screen answers one question first; secondary information earns its place through density, not decoration.

The system explicitly rejects the three reflexes that surface too often in this category: generic admin templates, stock dashboard looks, and AI-scaffold tells. Concretely, the system prohibits Material-default feels, identical card grids, decorative gradients, the small-uppercase-kicker reflex, and the numbered-eyebrow reflex. The system's character is operational, not performative.
keyCharacteristics: One screen, one question — primary surfaces lead with the answer; secondary info is one layer below.
Density without clutter — operators read fast, so type and spacing are tuned for a three-second scan without making the screen hostile to a new user.

Brand consistency across registers — the marketing site and the dashboard share tokens (color, type, motion) so a customer booking online and the manager fulfilling the order are visibly using the same product.
Brand color carries weight, not surface area — Operational Blue is a focused signal, not a wallpaper.

rules.name: The Operational-Blue Rule
rules.body: Operational Blue occupies ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. Wherever the eye lands, blue is the answer, not the wallpaper.

rules.name: The No-Decorative-Gradient Rule
rules.body: The primary action is a flat fill of Operational Blue (hover → Deep Cobalt). Gradients are permitted only inside the brand logo lockup, the loader's drawing circle, and the admin sidebar background. They are not a button, a card, or a section background.

rules.name: The No-Glassmorphism Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur is permitted only on the dark-mode toast container, the auth screen's split panel, and the public site's marketing hero where it sits on a real photograph. Inside the dashboard, blur is reserved for elevated popovers only. Never a default card surface.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only typeface. Weight, tracking, and case carry the hierarchy. Adding a second family is a structural change, not a stylistic one.

rules.name: The Balanced-Headline Rule
rules.body: text-wrap: balance is required on every h1, h2, and h3. text-wrap: pretty on long prose. No orphan widows in section openers.

rules.name: The Label-Reserved Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label is reserved for short labels (button text, kickers, status pills, table column headers). It is never used for body or paragraph copy.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or on a small set of elements that conceptually leave the page plane (popover, modal, toast).

rules.name: The Soft-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are short and soft (low offset, low blur, low opacity). If a shadow looks like a 2014 app, the offset is too big and the blur is too small.

dos: Lead every primary surface with the answer to one question. Make the next action visible in a three-second scan.
Use Operational Blue for the primary action, the active nav state, the focus ring, and the brand accent. Nothing else.
Use the flat primary button for the main CTA. Hover → Deep Cobalt. Active → scale 0.97.
Cap display type at clamp(2.5rem, 7vw, 6rem). Above 6rem the page is shouting, not designing.
Apply text-wrap: balance to every h1, h2, h3.
Verify body text hits ≥4.5:1 against its background. Bump body color toward ink if the muted gray is even close to failing.
Keep surfaces flat at rest. Use shadows only for hover, focus, popover, and modal elevation.
Provide a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation — typically a crossfade or an instant transition.
Test the longest heading copy at every breakpoint. Headings that overflow their container on tablet are not 'responsive.'
donts: Use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent) on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts. The 4px Sonner toast accent is the only sanctioned exception.
Use gradient text (background-clip: text combined with a gradient). Emphasis via weight or size.
Use glassmorphism as a default. Blur is permitted only on the auth panel, the marketing hero on a real photograph, the dark-mode toast, and popovers.
Repeat the same identical card grid across a screen. Use cards only when they're the best affordance; nested cards are always wrong.

Put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section. The 2023-era 'ABOUT / PROCESS / PRICING' kicker is the saturated AI scaffold. One named kicker as deliberate brand voice is allowed; an eyebrow on every section is AI grammar.
Number sections (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding. Numbers earn their place when the section is actually a sequence and the order carries information.
Ship the deprecated indigo→purple button gradient. Use the flat primary.
Use stock dashboard layouts: stats grid + bar chart + activity feed in a three-column template, copy-paste component libraries, Bootstrap-era blue. Custom composition per screen.
Exceed 75ch body line length. Long heading words + large clamp scales + narrow grids cause overflow on tablet/mobile. Test, don't assume.
